app_name: Ask Your Business - Multi-Month Import Certification Demo
data_policy: Anonymized demo data only. Original counterparties are not included.

summary.label: March 2020
headline_issues: Monthly status inflows do not match daily sheets by 82,789.00 RSD-equivalent.
Possible missing 700 EUR transaction from monthly summary.
Financial activity result appears not to be included correctly in monthly status.
summary.raw_source_file_label: 31 03 2020 .xlsx (private original Excel; not embedded in public demo)

validation_results.actual_value: 11 daily sheets, 1 monthly status sheet, 13 generic/template sheets
validation_results.explanation: Workbook structure was detected. Daily sheets follow date-style sheet names; final status sheet is Mesecni promet.
validation_results.action_required: Use this as initial import template for future months.

validation_results.explanation: Detected Devizni kurs / FX rate as 118.27.
validation_results.action_required: Reviewer should confirm this is the correct rate for all EUR conversions.

validation_results.check_name: Daily inflow totals tie to extracted transactions
validation_results.explanation: Sum of extracted transaction inflows matches the daily sheet DNEVNI PRILIV totals.

validation_results.check_name: Daily outflow totals tie to extracted transactions
validation_results.explanation: Sum of extracted transaction outflows matches the daily sheet DNEVNI ODLIV totals.
Each daily sheet's balances were tested using opening balance + inflows - outflows = closing balance.
validation_results.action_required: Review daily balance rows if any failure appears.

validation_results.expected_value: Each next opening balance equals previous closing balance
validation_results.explanation: Opening balances on each following daily sheet match the prior daily closing balance.
validation_results.action_required: Review omitted days/hidden activity if a continuity gap appears.

validation_results.explanation: Monthly status totals show 2,120,220.99 RSD-equivalent inflows, but daily sheets show 2,203,009.99. Difference is -82,789.00. Likely missing item: 700 EUR transaction on 04.03.2020., row 77, category Obnova godine.
validation_results.action_required: Reviewer must decide whether Mesecni promet formula/category mapping is wrong or whether the 700 EUR daily transaction should be excluded.

validation_results.explanation: Monthly status total outflows match daily sheet outflows.

validation_results.check_name: Financial activity result in Bilans uspeha
validation_results.explanation: Financial income (648,644.00) minus financial expense (23,530.00) equals 625,114.00, but the sheet shows zero for REZULTAT IZ FINASIJSKE AKTIVNOSTI.
validation_results.action_required: Reviewer must confirm whether financial activity should be included in final result or deliberately excluded.

validation_results.explanation: If all monthly inflows and outflows are included, recalculated net result differs from the sheet's net result because financial activity appears excluded in Bilans uspeha.
validation_results.action_required: Reviewer/accountant should certify correct reporting treatment.

validation_results.explanation: 63 of 225 staged transactions require manual review due to FX, inferred categories, non-operating/financial classification, split amount rows, or low confidence mappings.
validation_results.action_required: Review the Manual Review Queue and Mapping Review sheets.

validation_results.explanation: No exact duplicate candidates were found using date, direction, payment method, currency, amount, anonymized party, and purpose.
validation_results.action_required: Future versions should compare against bank statements and invoices for stronger duplicate detection.

validation_results.expected_value: No raw personal names in normalized package
validation_results.explanation: Counterparty names were anonymized for demo/import package use. The original workbook remains the source of truth and should not be uploaded to public GitHub.

manual_review_queue.details: Monthly status totals show 2,120,220.99 RSD-equivalent inflows, but daily sheets show 2,203,009.99. Difference is -82,789.00. Likely missing item: 700 EUR transaction on 04.03.2020., row 77, category Obnova godine.
manual_review_queue.suggested_action: Reviewer must decide whether Mesecni promet formula/category mapping is wrong or whether the 700 EUR daily transaction should be excluded.

manual_review_queue.description: Financial activity result in Bilans uspeha - FAIL
manual_review_queue.details: Financial income (648,644.00) minus financial expense (23,530.00) equals 625,114.00, but the sheet shows zero for REZULTAT IZ FINASIJSKE AKTIVNOSTI.
manual_review_queue.suggested_action: Reviewer must confirm whether financial activity should be included in final result or deliberately excluded.

manual_review_queue.description: Net result before tax recalculation - WARNING
manual_review_queue.details: If all monthly inflows and outflows are included, recalculated net result differs from the sheet's net result because financial activity appears excluded in Bilans uspeha.
manual_review_queue.suggested_action: Reviewer/accountant should certify correct reporting treatment.

manual_review_queue.details: 63 of 225 staged transactions require manual review due to FX, inferred categories, non-operating/financial classification, split amount rows, or low confidence mappings.
manual_review_queue.suggested_action: Review the Manual Review Queue and Mapping Review sheets.

summary.label: April 2020
headline_issues: April had one date sheet name variation: Datum 02.04.2020. Template v2 should detect dates inside sheet names, not only exact names.
Monthly formula audit found 4 date-sheet coverage issue(s).
April introduced 2 new category pair(s) not exactly in the March template: outflow / Doprinosi, outflow / Gorivo, struja.
summary.raw_source_file_label: 30.04.2020..xlsx (private original Excel; not embedded in public demo)

validation_results.explanation: The workbook XML was parsed and sheet list extracted.
March draft template and mapping memory were loaded and applied.

validation_results.expected_value: Daily sheet names exactly match March date-style regex
validation_results.explanation: April contains one or more date sheets with extra text. Parser handled this using date-substring detection, but the reusable template should be updated.
Monthly status sheet was found.

validation_results.expected_value: At least 70% of transaction rows reuse March mappings

validation_results.expected_value: No new raw categories vs March template
